name: Glass Panel
description: A translucent glass panel slides between two positions every few taps, blocking access to the boxes underneath. Plan your taps carefully!
howToPlay: Tap boxes to release marbles into the funnel. The glass panel blocks boxes underneath — you can see them but can't tap them. After every 3 taps, the panel slides to its other position, revealing new boxes and covering others. A counter on the panel shows how many taps remain before it moves. Plan your moves around the panel's rhythm!
author: Claude
